finding_results.notes: Replaced the abstract fade-out with on-page physiological decline: asymmetric breathing, wound whistle and foam, color loss, blood in the throat, and Noor confirming death through the visible absence of another breath cloud in the cold.

finding_results.notes: Converted the waiting section into a tactical shift. Lena closes the cafeteria and consolidates everyone onto the second floor, Priya relocates to the relay-room pod by choice, and Jae-won commits to the east-stairwell watch with his own hour count, leaving the chapter in a materially different configuration.

Rebuilt the opening around Jae-won bringing warm water, embedded the temperature inside action, reduced the smell to a single passing wave, and removed the body-logistics explanation/catalogue that previously front-loaded the chapter.
Revised chapter now measures 3945 words while preserving the `# Chapter 16` heading contract.

summary: Rebuilt the opening around human action, made Dane's death physically legible on page, and gave the midnight half a concrete survivor-geometry shift that carries directly into chapter 17 while bringing the chapter above the minimum word-count guardrail.
